frases.texto: Talk is cheap. Show me the code.
Any fool can write code that a computer can understand. Good programmers write code that humans can understand.
First, solve the problem. Then, write the code.
The best error message is the one that never shows up.
Code is like humor. When you have to explain it, it's bad.
Simplicity is the soul of efficiency.
Make it work, make it right, make it fast.
La perfección se alcanza no cuando no hay nada más que añadir, sino cuando no hay nada más que quitar.
Programs must be written for people to read, and only incidentally for machines to execute.
The most disastrous thing that you can ever learn is your first programming language.
El software es como la entropía: difícil de atrapar, no pesa y cumple la segunda ley de la termodinámica; es decir, siempre crece.
It's not a bug; it's an undocumented feature.
The only way to learn a new programming language is by writing programs in it.
Measuring programming progress by lines of code is like measuring aircraft building progress by weight.
Lo hermoso del código es que puedes destruirlo y reconstruirlo desde cero.
There are only two hard things in Computer Science: cache invalidation and naming things.
Any sufficiently advanced technology is indistinguishable from magic.
Si depurar es el proceso de eliminar errores, entonces programar debe ser el proceso de ponerlos.
Everybody should learn to program a computer, because it teaches you how to think.
La tecnología no es nada. Lo importante es que tengas fe en la gente, que sean básicamente buenas e inteligentes, y si les das herramientas, harán cosas maravillosas con ellas.
